findings.description: Qwen2.5-Omni is an end-to-end multimodal model by Qwen team at Alibaba Cloud, capable of understanding text, audio, vision, video, and performing real-time speech generation.

findings.title: QwenLM/Qwen3-Omni
findings.description: Qwen3-omni is a natively end-to-end, omni-modal LLM developed by the Qwen team at Alibaba Cloud, capable of understanding text, audio, images, and video, as well as generating speech in real time.
